_comment: iTrade MA Crossover Backtest Config — copy this file, edit as needed, then run: node run_backtest.js <your-config.json>
name: MA 25/99 · TP 2% · SL 1.2% · Long+Short

strategy._comment_fastPeriod: Short MA window (bars). Entry signal triggers when fast MA crosses slow MA.
strategy._comment_slowPeriod: Long MA window (bars). Must be greater than fastPeriod.
strategy._comment_takeProfitPercent: Take-profit distance from fill price, as a percentage. e.g. 2 = 2%.
strategy._comment_stopLossPercent: Stop-loss distance from fill price, as a percentage. 0 = no stop-loss.

data._comment_source: 'api' fetches the latest candles from Binance automatically. 'local' reads pre-downloaded JSON files from the directory specified in localDir.
data._comment_lookbackDays: How many calendar days of history to fetch. Binance returns up to ~90 days of 15m data cleanly; use fewer days for higher-frequency intervals.
data._comment_localDir: Only used when source is 'local'. Path to the folder containing kline JSON files. Can be absolute (/Users/you/klines) or relative to this config file (e.g. '../data' or 'data'). Each file must be named {sym.toLowerCase()}_{klineInterval}.json

account._comment_initialBalance: Starting paper-money balance in USDC (or quote asset).
account._comment_commissionRate: Per-side commission as a decimal. 0.0002 = 0.02% (Binance VIP maker rate).
account._comment_entryTtlBars: How many bars to wait for an entry limit order to fill before cancelling it.

symbols._comment: orderAmount and maxPos are in BASE asset units (BTC, ETH, SOL, WLD — NOT in USDC). maxPos sets the maximum allowed open position; typically 3-5× orderAmount.

paths._comment_outputDir: Directory where HTML reports will be saved. Relative to this config file.
paths._comment_projectRoot: Root of the iTrade monorepo (the folder containing packages/strategies/src). Leave null to auto-detect.
paths._comment_forceCompile: Set to true to force recompilation of the strategy even if the compiled output is up-to-date.
